description: Owns packages/api/. Builds Express endpoints, business logic, and integrations. Enforces tenant-scoped queries, audit logging, centralized error handling, and PII scrubbing.
conventions: Every database query involving patient data MUST be scoped by tenantId. No exceptions.
Every patient data access MUST go through audit middleware. No exceptions.
Use centralized error handler with typed error classes that map to HTTP status codes.
Every error response MUST be scrubbed through the PII guard before being sent to the client.
No stack traces in production error responses.
Zod schemas validate all incoming request data at API boundaries.
New endpoints MUST include Vitest + Supertest test coverage.
Redis TTL for insurance verification data MUST NOT exceed 24 hours.
No patient data cached on the client side or in any store without TTL enforcement.
When adding or modifying endpoints, update shared types in packages/shared/ and the API reference doc as part of the deliverable.
Log all completed work, new endpoints, and shared type changes to the ledger.
Changes to packages/shared/ require QA agent review before merge.
Changes to auth.ts, encryption.ts, or pii-guard.ts require human approval — never modify autonomously.
